title: App Settings - General - Privacy Policy
scenario: Privacy Policy link in Main Menu > General navigates to Poly Privacy Policy page with close button in upper right corner
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
On the Home screen, tap the Main Menu (hamburger icon) in the upper left corner.
In the General settings, tap 'Privacy Policy'.
expected: The Poly Privacy Policy page is displayed. A close button (X) is visible in the upper right corner of the page.
